metadata.title: Yuisei Maruyama | Engineer
metadata.description: Portfolio site of Yuisei Maruyama. A frontend engineer specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Currently working at CyberAgent.
metadata.ogDescription: Frontend development with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Currently working at CyberAgent.
metadata.twitterDescription: Frontend development with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

hero.description:
Modern web development with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
An engineer pursuing performance and accessibility.

about.bio1: Started career as a frontend engineer in 2019. After gaining experience with Vue.js / Nuxt.js, now focused on modern web development centered around React / Next.js.
about.bio2: At CyberAgent, Inc., led the 0-to-1 headless EC development using Shopify. Handled end-to-end from requirements gathering and design to implementation, testing, and deployment, while leading a team of 4-6 engineers.
about.bio3: Leveraged Claude AI to create requirements documents and design docs, and drove development process improvements by streamlining the workflow from issue creation through code review.

ec.title: Major Drugstore Chain — Headless EC Development
ec.description: Led 0-to-1 headless EC development using Shopify. Built core EC features (products, cart, orders, payments) and corporate site. Implemented social login and EC functionality with GraphQL, handling the full lifecycle from requirements to deployment.
highlights: Led a frontend team of 4-6 engineers: code review, task management, and technology selection
Designed and implemented social login (Email/Password, Google, Apple)
End-to-end development from backend API definition (Go) to frontend implementation
Maintenance page switching using load balancer
Collaborated with designers on 0-to-1 UI planning and implementation
Interaction testing using Storybook
Led PRD and design document creation. Streamlined requirements-to-review workflow using Claude AI
Performance improvements through component splitting and resolving package-related memory leaks
Feature flag-based release strategy for controlled feature rollouts

admin.title: Major Drugstore Chain — Admin Panel Development
admin.description: Admin panel development for EC operations using Next.js. Implemented product/inventory management, user/permission management, CMS functionality, and product display management powered by Vertex AI Search.
highlights: Product and inventory management feature design and implementation
User and permission management implementation
CMS functionality for content management
Product display management powered by Vertex AI Search

cms.title: CMS + MA Service Frontend Development
cms.description: Frontend development for a CMS and marketing automation service.
highlights: Implemented complex form interfaces
Marketing automation workflow UI

gov.title: Government Agency — User & Organization Management System
gov.description: User and organization management screens and application system for a government agency. Implemented complex form handling and cross-service integration with microservice architecture, covering both frontend and backend (Node.js).
highlights: Full-stack development covering frontend and backend (Node.js)
Implemented API coordination and authentication integration across multiple microservices
Designed multi-step form validation and dynamic conditional branching UI
Built accessible UI compliant with government accessibility standards

comm.title: Internal Communication Tool
comm.description: Development of an in-house communication tool using Scrum methodology.
highlights: Agile development with 2-week sprints
Real-time communication features

edu.title: Programming Education Service Renewal
edu.description: Full renewal of a programming education platform with modern architecture.
highlights: Atomic Design component architecture
Comprehensive test coverage with Jest

ec.title: Major Drugstore Chain — Headless EC Site
ec.description: 0-to-1 headless EC development using Shopify. Built core EC features (products, cart, orders, payments) and corporate site. Implemented social login and EC functionality with Shopify Storefront API (GraphQL).
highlights: Team lead of 4-6 engineers: code review, task management, technology selection
Social login (Email/Password, Google, Apple) — from requirements to implementation
End-to-end from backend API definition (Go) to frontend implementation
Collaborated with designers on 0-to-1 UI planning and implementation
Streamlined development process with Claude AI for requirements docs and design documents
Performance improvements through component splitting and memory leak resolution

gov.title: Government Agency Management System
gov.description: User and organization management screens and application system for a government agency. Implemented microservice architecture with complex form handling.
highlights: Full-stack development covering frontend and backend (Node.js)
API coordination and authentication integration across multiple microservices
Multi-step form validation with dynamic conditional branching UI
Accessible UI compliant with government accessibility standards

cms.title: CMS + MA Service
cms.description: Content management system with marketing automation capabilities for enterprise clients.
highlights: Dynamic form builder interface
Marketing automation workflow editor
Real-time preview functionality

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: This portfolio site built with modern web technologies featuring a liquid mercury/mirror aesthetic. Multilingual support (Japanese/English).
highlights: Liquid mercury/mirror design theme
Multilingual support with next-intl (JA/EN)
Mouse-following interactive background
Fully responsive + accessibility compliant
